title: Sense and Sensibility
author: Jane Austen
subjects: British and irish fiction (fictional works by one author)
For National Curriculum Key Stage 4 & GCSE
Study guides, home study & revision notes
description: Sense and Sensibility is the debut novel by English author Jane Austen, appearing in 1811. It was published anonymously: By A Lady appears on the title page where the author's name might have been.
